name: Kling O1 Reference Video to Video [Standard]
description: Kling O1 Omni generates new shots guided by an input reference video, preserving cinematic language such as motion, and camera style to produce seamless scene continuity.
tagline: Kling O1 Omni generates new shots guided by an input reference video, preserving cinematic language such as motion, and camera style to produce seamless scene continuity.
